memberdef.name: NCO_getset
NCOObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "source.NCO", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(NCOObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)NCOObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create an NCO instance.\n", .tp_methods = NCOObj_methods, .tp_getset = NCO_getset, .tp_new = NCOObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)NCOObj_init, }
